subcodes.first_line: We have perceived from thy letter the fragrance of sincerity and have answered thee through this epistle. It behooveth thee on this day to arise [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد وجدنا من کتابک عرف الخلوص و اجبناک بهذا الکتاب ینبغی لک الیوم ان تقوم
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @prayer for protection, @rejection, opposition and persecution
